reviews.comment:
Si estás en la ruta 8 y tenes que almorzar te podes acercar al ACA de Canals y comer una rica "costeleta" (o bife de costilla) con ensalada.

(Translated by Google)
If you're on Route 8 and need lunch, you can go to the ACA in Canals and eat a delicious "costeleta" (or rib steak) with salad.
